title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!
